title: How creator talent agencies are evolving into multi-platform operators
description: The legacy agency model is being re-built from the ground up to better serve the maturing creator economy – here's what that looks like.

title: ‘The conversation has shifted’: The CFO moved upstream. Now agencies have to as well
description: One interesting side effect of marketing coming under greater scrutiny in the boardroom: CFOs are working more closely with agencies than ever before.

title: Why one brand reimbursed $10,000 to customers who paid its ‘Trump Tariff Surcharge’ last year
description: Sexual wellness company Dame is one of the first brands to proactively return money tied to President Donald Trump’s now-invalidated tariffs.

title: Future of TV Briefing: How Paramount’s and Warner Bros. Discovery’s ad tech stacks stack up
description: This week’s Future of TV Briefing breaks down Paramount’s and Warner Bros. Discovery’s ad tech stacks now that the companies seem set (finally) to combine.

title: Omnicom Media North America CEO Ralph Pardo on integration and disintermediation
description: Ralph Pardo, CEO of Omnicom Media North America, explained how far along the holding company is in absorbing IPG's agency brands, as well as why they were kept alive.

title: [AINews] Anthropic @ $19B ARR, Qwen team leaves, Gemini and GPT bump up fast models
description: a quiet day

title: Today's NYT Mini Crossword Answers for Wednesday, March 4
description: Here are the answers for The New York Times Mini Crossword for March 4.

title: Merrell’s first global brand platform looks to redefine the outdoors
description: The footwear brand is pitching nature as a refuge for consumers who are overwhelmed by the pace and digital demands of modern life.

title: Is On’s muted guidance the sign of a ‘dwindling’ brand?
description: One analyst thinks so, though others brushed it off as the activewear brand scored 30% net sales growth in 2025 and record high Q4 margins.

title: Memory shortage looms over Best Buy’s prospects
description: Data centers are hoarding computing memory, which is poised to push up prices on consumer electronics at a time of already soft demand.

title: Target’s earnings lag in the holiday quarter
description: The retailer's net sales declined again, with drops across multiple merchandise categories. However, Target expects gains during fiscal 2026 and tapped a chief brand officer.

title: Stripe’s slower view of agentic commerce
description: The processing giant, like some other digital commerce specialists, sees agent-enabled shopping evolving at a measured pace.
